markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on outcomes, ownership, and lanes for growth](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pipeline variance is existential → 35 opps/mo hits plan; 16 opps/mo fails; Jan MTD = 16 → urgent fix](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Manage to outcomes, not activities → define lanes, owners, targets, budgets, and weekly review cadence](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Community lacks an end-to-end, scalable engine; events/webinars not “humming”; Dec pipeline abysmal; membership down; newsletters flat](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [2026 goals + budget → \>$3M to deploy; targets: GrowthX kickoffs 78 → 150; community MRR \~$5K → \~$90–100K; Check That ARR $0 → $2–5M (top priority to fund rest)](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline performance and risk

  - [New opps created: Oct = 35; Nov \~24; Dec = 16; Jan MTD = 16 → trending below plan](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Thresholds: 35/mo sustains annual goals; 16/mo “fail miserably” → must lock ≥35/mo with buffer](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Current management gap: no clear single owner driving monthly opp volume for GrowthX; “no-man’s land” between Jason/Tyler](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Required shift: weekly, outcomes-led management with explicit targets, confidence levels, and consequences](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

### Operating model: outcomes \> activities

  - [Problem: teams manage to “the next thing” (post/webinar/event) → resets to zero each cycle](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Solution: define lanes with end-to-end economics and owners:](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [Example lane pattern → Source (e.g., newsletter/social) → Conversion system (email cadence/webinar) → Monetization (paid member/opps) → Reinvest (budget tied to measured unit economics)](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [Guardrails from Jason to team; inspect lanes, not micro-activities](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Accountability: leaders synthesize for Marcel at outcomes level (ARR churn, sprint conversion, opps, retention), not tool updates](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

### Budget, priorities, and targets (2026)

  - [Budget under Jason: \>$3M (programs + headcount)](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Targets:](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [GrowthX: kickoffs 78 → 150; opp creation ≥35/mo locked](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Community: MRR \~$4–5K → \~$90–100K; build scalable acquisition + retention engine](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - Check That: ARR $0 → $2–5M; “crank the dial” if unit economics work; \#1 priority to fund other bets
  - [Investment rule: if CAC payback is proven and channel is scalable → scale spend aggressively](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

### Community: missing flywheel

  - [Current state: activity-managed (webinars/videos), no end-to-end path; members consume and churn → retention weak](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Gaps:](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [Acquisition: only workshops/social; no predictable subscriber growth engine](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
      - [Conversion: newsletter sends convert “some,” but no funnel into durable products or paid tiers](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
      - [Retention: no ongoing value to keep members post-consumption](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Lane examples to validate:](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [Newsletter engine → X new subs/week → onboarding cadence → paid member conversion (e.g., 5/100) → revenue per cohort → reinvest to acquire more subs](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [Cohorts → standardize curriculum; re-run proven formats; predictable calendar and fill plan](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [Lightning sessions (1/mo) → high-impact spikes → list growth and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Ownership: Jason fully owns community; must establish continuity so it runs without constant founder energy](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

### Events and webinars: under-leveraged

  - [Expectation: by now events lane should “hum” under Head of Events and Gloria with minimal founder input](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Reality: low volume, not scaling; webinars high effort from Marcel/Jason; December pipeline was abysmal; November slightly down](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Needed: structured H1 calendar, attendance targets, opp yield models, repeatable plays (dinners, executive events, field), and amplification into community/newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)

### Role scope and focus

  - [One person cannot simultaneously own: GrowthX pipeline, Community, and Check That PMM/GTM at current stage](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Jason is effective when dedicated to one lane (e.g., October pipeline surge) → focus, then hire/assign to sustain](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Team management: if a lane requires constant de-risking and re-input, revisit fit for stage](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)

## Next Steps

[Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

  - [Set targets and governance](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
      - [Lock monthly opp target (≥35) and 2026 lane-level targets by 2026-01-24](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
      - [Define weekly outcomes dashboard (opps created, sprint conversion, ARR churn, community MRR, newsletter subs + CVR, event attendance, pipeline from events/webinars)](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Clarify budgets](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [Publish 2026 budget by lane (pipeline, community, Check That) with scale-up thresholds (CAC/payback rules)](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Confirm ownership](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Decide and communicate single owner for GrowthX opp creation metric (Jason vs Tyler) by 2026-01-24](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

          - [GrowthX pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
          - [Community acquisition/retention](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
          - [Events + webinars](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
          - [Check That GTM (pre/post launch)](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [Due: 2026-01-27 weekly](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Build weekly outcomes dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Implement in HubSpot/Looker: opps/mo (vs 35 target), event/webinar pipeline, community MRR, subscriber growth and conversion, retention](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [Due: first version by 2026-01-27; review weekly](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Community engine](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [Design newsletter-driven acquisition → onboarding cadence → paid/retained member flow with measured CVR and ARPM](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [Propose initial KPIs (subs/week, onboarding CVR, paid conversion, churn) and test plan](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [Due: plan 2026-01-27; first test live by 2026-02-03](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Events/webinars program](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

      - [Shift from bespoke to repeatable plays (exec dinners by city, quarterly flagship webinars)](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [Due: calendar + model by 2026-01-27](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)

[Gloria](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

  - [Rebalance to events outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

[Head of Events](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

  - [If assigned GrowthX opp metric](https://fathom.video/share/SMbTExBTf3zjFS94jK6o6iJfntXnMbTs?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
